(defn gen-id [] (str (random-uuid)))
(defn new-node [text] {:id (gen-id) :text text :children [] :collapsed false :completed false})
;; Test:

;; Tree ops: find node by id (depth-first), return [node parent path]
(defn find-node [root id]
  (letfn [(walk [node parent path]
            (if (= (:id node) id)
              {:node node :parent parent :path path}
              (reduce-kv
                (fn [acc i child]
                  (if acc acc (walk child node (conj path i))))
                nil (:children node))))]
    (walk root nil [])))

;; Debug find-node
(defn find-node [root id]
  (letfn [(walk [node parent path]
            (println "walk:" (:id node) "looking for:" id "eq?" (= (:id node) id))
            (if (= (:id node) id)
              {:node node :parent parent :path path}
              (reduce-kv
                (fn [acc i child]
                  (println "  child" i ":" (:id child) "acc:" acc)
                  (if acc acc (walk child node (conj path i))))
                nil (:children node))))]
    (walk root nil [])))

(find-node root (:id c1))

;; Fixed find-node - use doseq-style explicit loop
(defn find-node [root id]
  (letfn [(walk [node parent path]
            (if (= (:id node) id)
              {:node node :parent parent :path path}
              (let [children (:children node)]
                (loop [i 0]
                  (when (< i (count children))
                    (let [result (walk (nth children i) node (conj path i))]
                      (if result result (recur (inc i)))))))))]
    (walk root nil [])))

(println "Find c1:" (pr-str (find-node root (:id c1))))
(println "Find c2:" (pr-str (find-node root (:id c2))))
(println "Find root:" (pr-str (find-node root (:id root))))

;; Add child to node
(defn add-child [root parent-id child]
  (let [parent (find-node root parent-id)
        pnode (:node parent)
        children (:children pnode)
        new-children (conj (vec children) child)
        new-pnode (assoc pnode :children new-children)]
    (if (:parent parent)
      ;; Has parent: update in parent's children
      (let [pp (:parent parent)
            path (:path parent)
            idx (last path)
            pp-children (:children pp)
            new-pp-children (assoc (vec pp-children) idx new-pnode)
            new-pp (assoc pp :children new-pp-children)]
        ;; Recurse up
        (if-let [grandparent (:parent (find-node root (:id pp)))]
          (add-child root (:id grandparent) new-pp) ;; oversimplified, need proper update
          new-pp))
      ;; Root node
      new-pnode)))

(println "Add child test...")

;; Clean tree update by path (vector of child indices)
(defn update-in-tree [root path f]
  (if (empty? path)
    (f root)
    (let [idx (first path)
          children (vec (:children root))
          child (nth children idx)
          updated-child (update-in-tree child (rest path) f)
          new-children (assoc children idx updated-child)]
      (assoc root :children new-children))))

;; get-in-tree
(defn get-in-tree [root path]
  (if (empty? path)
    root
    (let [idx (first path)
          children (:children root)]
      (get-in-tree (nth children idx) (rest path)))))

;; Add child at end of node at path
(defn add-child-at [root path child]
  (update-in-tree root path
    (fn [node]
      (assoc node :children (conj (vec (:children node)) child)))))

;; Remove node at path
(defn remove-at [root path]
  (if (empty? path)
    root ;; can't remove root
    (let [parent-path (butlast path)
          idx (last path)]
      (update-in-tree root parent-path
        (fn [parent]
          (let [children (vec (:children parent))]
            (assoc parent :children
              (vec (concat (take idx children) (drop (inc idx) children))))))))))

;; Insert sibling above at path (same depth)
(defn insert-sibling-above [root path node]
  (if (empty? path)
    root ;; can't insert above root
    (let [parent-path (butlast path)
          idx (last path)]
      (update-in-tree root parent-path
        (fn [parent]
          (let [children (vec (:children parent))]
            (assoc parent :children
              (vec (concat (take idx children) [node] (drop idx children))))))))))

;; Toggle collapsed
(defn toggle-collapsed [root path]
  (update-in-tree root path
    (fn [node] (assoc node :collapsed (not (:collapsed node))))))

;; Toggle completed
(defn toggle-completed [root path]
  (update-in-tree root path
    (fn [node] (assoc node :completed (not (:completed node))))))

;; Update text
(defn update-text [root path text]
  (update-in-tree root path
    (fn [node] (assoc node :text text))))

;; Test:
(def root (new-node "Root"))
(def root (add-child-at root [] (new-node "A")))
(def root (add-child-at root [] (new-node "B")))
(def root (add-child-at root [0] (new-node "A1")))
(println "Tree:" (pr-str root))
(println "Get [0]:" (pr-str (get-in-tree root [0])))
(println "Remove [1]:" (pr-str (remove-at root [1])))

;; Flatten tree to visible nodes [{:node :depth :path}]
(defn flatten-tree 
  ([root] (flatten-tree root 0 []))
  ([root depth path]
   (let [here [{:node root :depth depth :path path}]
         children (:children root)
         collapsed (:collapsed root)]
     (if (or collapsed (empty? children))
       here
       (reduce (fn [acc [i child]]
                 (concat acc (flatten-tree child (inc depth) (conj path i))))
               here
               (map-indexed vector children))))))

;; Test flatten
(println "Flattened:")
(doseq [item (flatten-tree root)]
  (println (apply str (repeat (:depth item) "  ")) 
           (if (:collapsed (:node item)) "▸ " "▾ ")
           (:text (:node item))
           " [" (pr-str (:path item)) "]"))

;; ── Core Data Model ──
(defn new-node [id text parent]
  {:id id :text text :parent parent :children [] :collapsed false :completed false})

(defn gen-id [] (str "n" (random-uuid)))

(def initial-state
  (let [root-id "root"
        child1 (gen-id)
        child2 (gen-id)
        gchild (gen-id)]
    {:nodes {root-id (assoc (new-node root-id "Vimflowy" nil) :children [child1 child2])
             child1   (assoc (new-node child1 "Welcome to Vimflowy" root-id) :children [gchild])
             child2   (new-node child2 "Press ? for help" root-id)
             gchild   (new-node gchild "Try j/k to navigate" child1)}
     :focused root-id
     :mode :normal
     :help false}))

(def app (atom initial-state))

;; ── Node Accessors ──
(defn nodes [] (:nodes @app))
(defn focused [] (:focused @app))
(defn mode [] (:mode @app))
(defn get-node [id] (get (nodes) id))
(defn get-parent [id] (:parent (get-node id)))

;; ── Flat Visible List (depth-first, respecting collapsed) ──
(defn visible-nodes []
  (let [nds (nodes)]
    (loop [stack (list (nds "root"))
           result []]
      (if (empty? stack)
        result
        (let [node (first stack)
              remaining (rest stack)]
          (if (:collapsed node)
            (recur remaining (conj result (:id node)))
            (recur (into (mapv nds (reverse (:children node))) remaining)
                   (conj result (:id node)))))))))
